signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Resolved, Triggering XRP's 10% April Surge Above $1
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Resolved, Triggering XRP's 10% April Surge Above $1.50 | YES | HIGH confidence**[1][2]

The SEC's decision to drop its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs has been confirmed as resolved, removing a major regulatory overhang that suppressed XRP's price for years and sparking a rally from ~$1.20 early April to a high of $1.51094 on April 17, now consolidating at ~$1.4
